title.zh: 嵌入式软件工程师｜设备通信 · 4G 网关 · IoT 平台
title.en: Embedded Software Engineer · Device Connectivity · 4G Gateways · IoT Platforms

summary.zh: 3 年以上嵌入式软件与物联网项目经验，以 C、Linux 与设备通信为核心，覆盖 MCU/RTOS、4G 网关、跨端 APP、Web 平台和上位机工具。擅长把复杂通信链路拆解为可验证、可交付、可长期维护的系统。
summary.en: 3+ years building embedded and IoT products with C, Linux, and device connectivity at the core, spanning MCU/RTOS, 4G gateways, cross-platform apps, web platforms, and desktop tools. I turn complex communication paths into systems that can be verified, shipped, and maintained.

availability.zh: 开放嵌入式软件工程师机会
availability.en: Open to embedded software engineering opportunities

title.zh: 让硬件可靠地表达状态

body.zh: C、FreeRTOS、RT-Thread、LWIP、USART 与 DMA，构成稳定通信的第一层。
body.en: C, FreeRTOS, RT-Thread, LWIP, USART, and DMA form the first layer of reliable connectivity.

title.zh: 把多协议汇成一条可控链路
title.en: Unify protocols into one controlled path

body.zh: 在 TCP、UDP、MQTT、RS485、USB、BLE 与 SPP 之间完成协议设计、适配与联调。
body.en: Design, adapt, and verify flows across TCP, UDP, MQTT, RS485, USB, BLE, and SPP.

title.zh: 让控制抵达每一个终端

body.zh: 以 Flutter、Android 原生与设备通信桥接，覆盖 Android、iOS、HarmonyOS。
body.en: Bridge Flutter and native Android with devices across Android, iOS, and HarmonyOS.

title.zh: 从现场交付走向持续演进
title.en: Move from field delivery to continuous evolution

body.zh: 通过 Go、Vue 3、数据存储和部署文档，将设备能力沉淀为可运营的平台。
body.en: Use Go, Vue 3, data systems, and deployment discipline to turn device capabilities into an operable platform.

title.zh: 嵌入式与实时系统
通信与协议
平台与跨端
调试与交付

company.zh: 北京软石智控科技有限公司

role.zh: 嵌入式软件开发工程师

summary.zh: 负责从 MCU/RTOS、嵌入式 Linux 设备与 4G 网关，到移动端 APP、Web 平台及上位机工具的开发、调试和交付。
summary.en: Build, debug, and deliver systems spanning MCU/RTOS, embedded Linux devices and 4G gateways, mobile apps, web platforms, and desktop tools.

bullets.zh:
- 设计自定义 JSON 协议，覆盖指令下发、状态采集、文件传输与远程控制。
- 完成 4G、USB、BLE、SPP、TCP、UDP、MQTT、RS485 等通道的适配与联调。
- 参与 Air780E、HC32、FreeRTOS、RT-Thread、LWIP、USART、DMA 的移植与调试。
- 参与 Vue 3 + TypeScript 前端、Go 后端和 Flutter APP 开发，完成 Android、iOS、HarmonyOS 三平台发布。
- 负责部署、客户现场适配、性能优化、问题闭环与技术文档。
bullets.en:
- Designed a JSON protocol for commands, telemetry, file transfer, and remote control.
- Integrated 4G, USB, BLE, SPP, TCP, UDP, MQTT, and RS485 channels.
- Ported and debugged Air780E, HC32, FreeRTOS, RT-Thread, LWIP, USART, and DMA components.
- Contributed to Vue 3 + TypeScript frontends, Go services, and Flutter apps released across Android, iOS, and HarmonyOS.
- Owned deployments, field adaptation, performance tuning, issue closure, and technical documentation.

title.zh: 物联网集中控制平台

summary.zh: 面向 Linux 嵌入式设备的集中管理、指令控制、数据采集与文件下发平台。
summary.en: A platform for centralized management, command execution, telemetry, and file delivery across embedded Linux devices.

background.zh: 设备类型和强弱电功能持续扩展，需要一套统一、可演进的设备控制架构。
background.en: Growing device types and power-control modules required a unified architecture that could evolve without fragmenting operations.

actions.zh:
- 负责 Vue 3 前端、Go 后端接口及设备控制核心功能。
- 制定平台与下位机之间的 JSON 通信协议。
- 设计指令、状态和文件传输流程，并参与强弱电模块测试。
actions.en:
- Built core Vue 3 interfaces, Go APIs, and device-control workflows.
- Defined the JSON protocol between the platform and embedded clients.
- Designed command, state, and file-transfer flows and validated power-control modules.

results.zh:
- 实现多类型设备的统一接入与控制。
- 完成部署和环境适配，持续维护操作说明书。
results.en:
- Delivered unified onboarding and control for multiple device types.
- Completed deployment adaptation and maintained operational documentation.

title.zh: 4G 设备管理跨端 APP

summary.zh: 通过 4G、USB、SPP 与 BLE 管理设备、传输文件并执行远程升级。
summary.en: Manage devices, transfer files, and perform remote upgrades over 4G, USB, SPP, and BLE.

background.zh: 同一设备需要同时覆盖远程、本地有线和近场无线三类控制场景。
background.en: The same device needed consistent control across remote, local wired, and nearby wireless scenarios.

actions.zh:
- 开发 Flutter 核心功能与原生通信桥接。
- 适配 4G、USB、SPP、BLE 通信和文件传输。
- 配合设备端完成协议联调、异常定位与版本迭代。
actions.en:
- Built Flutter workflows and native communication bridges.
- Integrated 4G, USB, SPP, BLE, and file transfer.
- Coordinated protocol debugging, failure analysis, and release iterations with embedded teams.

results.zh:
- 完成 Android、iOS、HarmonyOS 多平台打包发布。
- 应用成功上架 Android 应用商店、Apple App Store 与华为应用商店。
results.en:
- Shipped Android, iOS, and HarmonyOS packages.
- Published releases to Android stores, Apple App Store, and Huawei AppGallery.

title.zh: 嵌入式 4G 网关

summary.zh: 连接上位平台与强电、弱电设备的多协议 Linux 网关。
summary.en: A multi-protocol Linux gateway connecting cloud platforms with high- and low-voltage devices.

background.zh: 已有硬件需要快速演进为支持多通信通道、场景编排和本地数据管理的新产品。
background.en: Existing hardware needed to evolve into a product supporting multiple channels, scene orchestration, and local data management.

actions.zh:
- 负责需求、架构、协议、功能开发到性能优化的完整流程。
- 实现 TCP、UDP、MQTT、RS485 指令转发与设备数据读取。
- 设计基于时间轴的多场景、多事件联动控制。
actions.en:
- Owned requirements, architecture, protocol design, implementation, and tuning.
- Implemented TCP, UDP, MQTT, and RS485 command routing and data acquisition.
- Designed timeline-based orchestration across scenes, events, and channels.

results.zh:
- 完成网关核心功能和 SQLite 本地化管理。
- 支持客户平台部署、适配和现场问题闭环。
results.en:
- Delivered gateway fundamentals and SQLite-backed local management.
- Supported platform deployment, customer adaptation, and field issue closure.

title.zh: Air780E 与 HC32 通信开发

summary.zh: 验证 Cat.1 模块能力，完成 MCU、4G 模块与 PC 之间的稳定通信。
summary.en: Validated Cat.1 capabilities and established reliable communication among MCU, 4G module, and PC.

background.zh: 项目需要验证模块网络能力、FOTA 流程，并解决 HC32 与 Air780E 的 IP 包和多任务调试问题。
background.en: The project required network and FOTA validation while resolving IP packet and multitasking issues between HC32 and Air780E.

actions.zh:
- 测试 TCP 带宽、HTTP/HTTPS、DNS 与 FOTA。
- 移植 FreeRTOS、RT-Thread、LWIP、USART 与 DMA。
- 使用 J-Link、GDB、OpenOCD、Ozone 分析任务切换和内存分布。
actions.en:
- Tested TCP throughput, HTTP/HTTPS, DNS, and FOTA.
- Ported FreeRTOS, RT-Thread, LWIP, USART, and DMA.
- Used J-Link, GDB, OpenOCD, and Ozone to analyze scheduling and memory.

results.zh:
- 解决模块间 IP 包通信问题并实现 TCP 通信。
- 完成开发环境、资源情况与调试流程文档。
results.en:
- Resolved inter-module IP packet issues and enabled TCP communication.
- Documented the development environment, resource usage, and debugging workflow.

title.zh: 上位机与音视频工具

summary.zh: 围绕 DXF 处理、音视频同步、实时帧输出和动画控制优化上位机工具链。
summary.en: Desktop tooling for DXF processing, audio-video synchronization, real-time frame output, and animation control.

role.zh: 软件开发与优化工程师

background.zh: 旧有工具在图形处理效率、跨平台音视频同步和特定演示控制上需要持续优化。
background.en: Legacy tooling needed improvements in geometry throughput, cross-platform synchronization, and specialized visual control.

actions.zh:
- 使用 VB6 与 Python 优化 DXF 线段分割。
- 基于 FFmpeg 实现指定帧跳转、实时帧输出和音频同步。
- 使用 VBDX9 实现旋转过程中图片方向保持不变。
actions.en:
- Optimized DXF line segmentation with VB6 and Python.
- Implemented frame seeking, real-time frame output, and audio sync with FFmpeg.
- Built VBDX9 animation logic that preserves image orientation during rotation.

results.zh:
- 将音视频能力封装为支持 Linux 与 Windows 的库。
- 提升图形处理效率与播放同步一致性。
results.en:
- Packaged media capabilities for Linux and Windows.
- Improved geometry processing throughput and playback consistency.

title.zh: 产品说明书与 AI 知识库

summary.zh: 将产品说明书、技术资料和常见问题整合为线上资料平台与 Dify 智能问答。
summary.en: An online documentation platform and Dify knowledge base built from manuals, technical references, and FAQs.

background.zh: 客户、销售与售后需要更快定位产品资料，减少重复答疑。
background.en: Customers, sales, and support teams needed faster access to product knowledge with less repeated manual assistance.

actions.zh:
- 整合产品说明书、技术支持资料和常见问题。
- 搭建 Dify 知识库并开发 APP 端接入。
- 建设支持在线查看和下载的说明书平台。
actions.en:
- Consolidated manuals, support references, and FAQs.
- Built a Dify knowledge base and integrated it into the mobile app.
- Delivered an online platform for viewing and downloading documentation.

results.zh:
- 提供面向客户、销售和售后的智能问答与资料检索入口。
- 提升用户自助查询能力，减少重复资料答疑。
results.en:
- Delivered intelligent Q&A and retrieval for customers, sales, and support.
- Improved self-service access to product information and reduced repeated documentation questions.

title.zh: Android 与嵌入式设备通信

summary.zh: Android 原生 APP 与 Linux 设备之间的 USB、蓝牙和 4G 通信。
summary.en: Native Android communication with Linux devices over USB, Bluetooth, and 4G.

background.zh: 设备需要同时覆盖本地有线、近场无线与 4G 远程控制，并在脱机控制、文件传输和音视频播放场景中保持数据一致。
background.en: The device required local wired, nearby wireless, and remote 4G control while keeping data consistent across offline control, file transfer, and media playback.

actions.zh:
- 使用 Android Studio + Java 开发 USB、BLE、SPP 与 4G 通信。
- 优化文件传输、UI 数据同步和多通道切换流程。
- 开发脱机控制、FFmpeg 音频播放与 NFC 读卡功能。
actions.en:
- Built USB, BLE, SPP, and 4G communication with Android Studio and Java.
- Improved file transfer, UI synchronization, and channel-switching flows.
- Developed offline control, FFmpeg audio playback, and NFC card reading.

results.zh:
- 完成 Android APP 与 Linux 设备之间的多通道数据交互。
- 持续维护脱机控制并完成通信、播放与页面问题定位。
results.en:
- Delivered multi-channel data exchange between the Android app and Linux devices.
- Maintained offline control and resolved communication, playback, and UI issues.

title.zh: QEMU 虚拟平台

summary.zh: 在 Windows 中搭建 Cortex-A9 Linux 与 Cortex-M4 FreeRTOS 虚拟环境。
summary.en: Cortex-A9 Linux and Cortex-M4 FreeRTOS virtual environments hosted on Windows.

background.zh: 需要在 Windows 环境中验证 ARM Linux 与 Cortex-M FreeRTOS 的启动、图形和调试能力。
background.en: ARM Linux and Cortex-M FreeRTOS startup, graphics, and debugging capabilities needed validation in a Windows-hosted environment.

actions.zh:
- 使用 QEMU 搭建 Cortex-A9 Linux 虚拟机并配置 SSH。
- 搭建 Cortex-M4 + FreeRTOS 环境，执行 Framebuffer 图像与任务启动测试。
- 配置 GDB 调试并验证运行流程。
actions.en:
- Built a Cortex-A9 Linux virtual machine in QEMU and configured SSH.
- Created a Cortex-M4 + FreeRTOS environment for framebuffer and task-start tests.
- Configured GDB and validated runtime behavior.

results.zh: 完成两类处理器虚拟平台的运行、调试与全面测试。
results.en: Completed runtime, debugging, and validation for two processor-family virtual platforms.

title.zh: LoRa 物联网智慧牧场

summary.zh: LoRa 自组织网络、Android APP 与 C# 上位机组成的环境监测与控制系统。
summary.en: Environmental monitoring and control built with a LoRa mesh, Android app, and C# desktop client.

background.zh: 项目面向智慧养殖场的环境监测与自动控制，通过 LoRa 自组织网络连接节点与网关，并由移动端和上位机完成集中管理。
background.en: The project targeted environmental monitoring and automated control for smart farming, connecting nodes and gateways through a LoRa mesh with mobile and desktop management.

actions.zh:
- 使用 Android Studio + Java 开发移动端状态显示与控制。
- 使用 .NET / C# 开发数据采集、存储、分析和设备控制上位机。
- 参与 LoRa 通信流程、Python 数据分析与技术文档整理。
actions.en:
- Built Android status and control workflows with Java.
- Developed a .NET/C# desktop client for acquisition, storage, analysis, and control.
- Contributed to LoRa connectivity, Python analysis, and technical documentation.

results.zh: 完成移动端、上位机与通信文档交付，并以第一作者发表两篇相关论文。
results.en: Delivered mobile, desktop, and communication documentation and published two related papers as first author.

title.zh: 冬奥会电梯测试软件

summary.zh: 连接信号仪、功率计与场强计的辐射参数测试和报表软件。
summary.en: Radiation parameter testing and reporting software integrating signal, power, and field-strength instruments.

background.zh: 测试流程需要统一连接信号仪、功率计和场强计，完成辐射参数设置、校准、采集、动态展示与报表导出。
background.en: The test workflow needed unified integration of signal, power, and field-strength instruments for configuration, calibration, acquisition, live display, and report export.

actions.zh:
- 使用 C# / .NET 开发仪器通信、参数设置、校准测试与数据采集。
- 实现单项与汇总数据动态展示、报表导出和机械装置远程控制。
- 负责界面、后端代码、项目测试和交付文档。
actions.en:
- Built instrument communication, parameter setup, calibration, and acquisition in C#/.NET.
- Implemented live single/aggregate views, report export, and remote mechanical control.
- Owned UI, backend code, testing, and delivery documentation.

results.zh: 三人项目小组完成测试软件开发并顺利交付。
results.en: Delivered the completed test application as part of a three-person team.

title.zh: 智慧仓储

summary.zh: 基于 ARM、Linux 与 C 的校内实训项目。
summary.en: An ARM, Linux, and C training project for smart warehouse management.

background.zh: 校内实训要求在 ARM 开发板上完成计步与智慧仓储管理，覆盖从 Linux 系统到 Web 管理功能的完整链路。
background.en: The training project required step counting and smart warehouse management on an ARM board, spanning the Linux system and web-facing management functions.

actions.zh:
- 使用 C 与 Linux 开发 ARM 设备功能。
- 参与系统移植、Linux 内核编译与移植、驱动开发。
- 完成 BOA 与 CGI 的移植、配置和功能编码。
actions.en:
- Built ARM device functionality with C and Linux.
- Worked on system porting, Linux kernel builds and porting, and driver development.
- Ported and configured BOA and CGI and implemented related functions.

results.zh: 完成智慧仓储实训项目并获得 95 分。
results.en: Completed the smart warehouse training project with a score of 95.

degree.en: B.Eng. in Internet of Things Engineering

details.zh: 国家励志奖学金、三好学生、三好学生标兵、优秀毕业设计。
details.en: National Encouragement Scholarship, Outstanding Student honors, and Excellent Graduation Project.

title.zh: 第一作者：《基于 LoRa 物联网的智慧牧场系统》
title.en: First-author paper: LoRa-based IoT Smart Ranch System

title.zh: 第十一届蓝桥杯电子类省级三等奖
第一作者：《基于 LoRa 网络的 Android 智慧养殖场系统》
title.en: First-author paper: Android Smart Farm System over LoRa

title.zh: CET-4 · 普通话二级甲等 · 驾驶证 C1
title.en: CET-4 · Mandarin Level 2-A · Driver License C1
